events.label: reasoning
events.text:
The scenario describes structural bolting where turn-of-nut match marks are absent or not rotated. This is a quality issue - the turn-of-nut method requires match marks to verify proper rotation/tightening. Without match marks, there's no verification that bolts were properly tightened per RCSC Specification.

This is a fail condition - non-compliant with RCSC requirements for turn-of-nut method.

  "rationale": "The RCSC Specification requires that when the turn-of-nut method is used, match marks must be placed on nut and bolt/projected steel to verify the required rotation from snug-tight. Absent or unrotated match marks mean pretension cannot be verified, making the installation non-compliant and defective at this stage.",
